project-001/administrator/src/main/java/.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
project-001/administrator/src/main/java/.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code using javax.validation will fail to compile or encounter ClassNotFoundException at runtime on Spring Boot 3.x.
